title: Resolve naming drift between BrandBuild and ai-video-studio
description: Decide whether the package and workspace names should be aligned with BrandBuild or intentionally remain AI Video Studio internally.
notes: This is branding and maintainability cleanup, not a blocker for core product work.

title: Finish branded Supabase Auth setup
description: Enable the Supabase Send Email Hook, configure branded SMTP sending, and clean redirect URLs so auth emails and magic links are fully BrandBuild-native.
notes: Code exists, but the dashboard-side Supabase configuration is still the blocker.

title: Validate one real Sora run through the dashboard
description: Upload a viable reference asset if needed, launch a real Sora generation from a shot, and capture request, status refresh, output sync, and any failure modes.
notes: Live account-side access may still be the limiting factor even with the OpenAI key configured.

title: Validate one real Kling run through the dashboard
description: Launch a real Kling generation from a shot and capture auth, request normalization, async status behavior, and output sync.
notes: Current adapter is live-capable but still needs one confirmed operator run.

title: Validate one real Higgsfield run through the dashboard
description: Launch a real Higgsfield generation with a valid reference image and capture request, polling, output sync, and any model-specific edge cases.
notes: The default model path expects a reference image for the safest first validation run.

title: Build compare outputs workspace
description: Create a first-class UI for side-by-side output review across providers, with selection, notes, and decision capture tied to projects and shots.
notes: This is the next strongest product workflow gap after auth trust and provider validation.

title: Build version timeline and edit handoff/export layer
description: Add version groups, chosen-output sequencing, editor notes, and export bundles so approved outputs can move into finishing without a full browser editor.
notes: This is the correct next step before considering a full editing interface.

title: Consolidate project memory folders
description: Keep docs/project-memory canonical, mirror .project-memory, and maintain the requested root project-memory operating files.
notes: This keeps future sessions from loading stale project state.

title: Keep production deployment current
description: Ensure brandbuild.online points at the intended BrandBuild deployment and re-alias production when it drifts behind local validated work.
notes: Completed by deploying the latest local workspace to Vercel production and confirming the live domain.

title: Resolve Next.js workspace-root warning
description: Set outputFileTracingRoot or remove the extra lockfile so Next.js stops inferring the workspace root from the parent D:\Playground directory.
notes: Not a current production blocker, but it is durable build hygiene work.

title: Remove non-fatal Dynamic server usage warning on /
description: Refactor the marketing root session check so build-time static evaluation does not log a Dynamic server usage warning when cookies are touched.
notes: The warning is currently non-fatal, but it pollutes build logs and could mask real issues.

title: Push the deployed local fixes to origin/main
description: Commit the current dashboard hardening, memory updates, and env-pull gitignore change so git matches the live production deployment again.
notes: Production is already running the local changes, but git is still behind.
